name: Garlic Casserole Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix yeast in water. Combine all ingredients except flour with the yeast mixture, then add flour a little at a time.
3. Let dough rise until doubled.
4. Knead dough and place it into a greased casserole dish. Allow to rise for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Bake for 40 minutes.
